result.stdout:
USAGE:
    metricsreporter [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter generate --metrics-dir build/Metrics --opencover 
coverage.xml --roslyn metrics.xml --sarif analyzers.sarif --output-json 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
    metricsreporter generate --input-json 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json --output-html 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.html
    metricsreporter read --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json 
--namespace Sample.Loader --metric Complexity
    metricsreporter readsarif --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
--namespace Sample.Loader
    metricsreporter readsarif --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
--namespace Sample.Loader --metric SarifIdeRuleViolations --all

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    generate     Aggregates metrics from OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF inputs and      
                 produces metrics-report.json/metrics-report.html               
    read         Reads metric violations for a namespace. Returns the most      
                 severe violation by default; use --all for full listing        
    readsarif    Aggregates SARIF-based metrics (SarifCaRuleViolations,         
                 SarifIdeRuleViolations) by rule ID for the specified namespace 
    test         Checks whether a symbol satisfies the specified metric after   
                 refactoring

USAGE:
    metricsreporter [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:

    metricsreporter readsarif --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    generate     Aggregates metrics from OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF inputs and      
                 produces metrics-report.json/metrics-report.html               
    read         Reads metric violations for a namespace. Returns the most

    readsarif    Aggregates SARIF-based metrics (SarifCaRuleViolations,         
                 SarifIdeRuleViolations) by rule ID for the specified namespace

                 refactoring

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Aggregates metrics from OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF inputs and produces 
metrics-report.json/metrics-report.html.

USAGE:
    metricsreporter generate [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter generate --metrics-dir build/Metrics --opencover 
coverage.xml --roslyn metrics.xml --sarif analyzers.sarif --output-json 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
    metricsreporter generate --input-json 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json --output-html 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.html

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                         Prints help information  
    -v, --version                                      Prints version           
                                                       information              
        --config <PATH>                                Optional path to         
                                                       .metricsreporter.json. If
                                                       omitted, the file is     
                                                       discovered by walking up 
                                                       from the working         
                                                       directory                
        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>    Controls informational   
                                                       logging. Errors are      
                                                       always logged            
        --timeout <SECONDS>                            Timeout in seconds for   
                                                       external scripts.        
                                                       Defaults to configuration
                                                       or 900 seconds           
        --working-dir <PATH>                           Working directory used   
                                                       for resolving relative   
                                                       paths                    
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                     Controls execution of    
                                                       configured scripts.      
                                                       Defaults to true         
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>         Controls aggregation     
                                                       after scripts. Defaults  
                                                       to true for              
                                                       read/test/readsarif;     
                                                       ignored for generate     
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                   Maximum number of        
                                                       stdout/stderr characters 
                                                       logged on script         
                                                       failures. Defaults to    
                                                       4000                     
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                        JSON object mapping      
                                                       metric identifiers to    
                                                       alias arrays. CLI        
                                                       overrides env/config     
        --solution-name <NAME>                         Solution name displayed  
                                                       in reports               
        --metrics-dir <PATH>                           Root directory for       
                                                       metrics artifacts        
                                                       (OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF/b
                                                       aseline)                 
        --opencover <PATH>                             Path to OpenCover        
                                                       coverage XML. Repeat for 
                                                       multiple files           
        --roslyn <PATH>                                Path to Roslyn metrics   
                                                       XML. Repeat for multiple 
                                                       files                    
        --sarif <PATH>                                 Path to SARIF file.      
                                                       Repeat for multiple files
        --baseline <PATH>                              Path to baseline metrics 
                                                       JSON                     
        --baseline-ref <TEXT>                          Baseline reference label 
                                                       (git commit, build ID,   
                                                       etc.)                    
        --output-json <PATH>                           Path to the resulting    
                                                       metrics-report.json      
        --output-html <PATH>                           Path to the resulting    
                                                       metrics-report.html      
        --thresholds <JSON>                            Inline JSON string with  
                                                       metric thresholds        
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                       Path to JSON file with   
                                                       symbol-level thresholds  
        --input-json <PATH>                            Existing                 
                                                       metrics-report.json used 
                                                       to generate HTML only    
        --excluded-members <LIST>                      Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       member name patterns to  
                                                       exclude                  
        --exclude-methods                              Exclude methods from     
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-properties                           Exclude properties from  
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-fields                               Exclude fields from      
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-events                               Exclude events from      
                                                       metrics output           
        --excluded-assemblies <LIST>                   Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       assembly name patterns to
                                                       exclude                  
        --excluded-types <LIST>                        Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       type name patterns to    
                                                       exclude                  
        --replace-baseline                             Replace baseline when new
                                                       report differs           
        --baseline-storage-path <PATH>                 Directory where old      
                                                       baseline files are       
                                                       archived                 
        --coverage-html-dir <PATH>                     Directory containing HTML
                                                       coverage reports for     
                                                       hyperlinking             
        --analyze-suppressed-symbols                   Enable suppressed-symbol 
                                                       analysis before          
                                                       aggregation              
        --suppressed-symbols <PATH>                    Path to JSON file where  
                                                       suppressed symbol        
                                                       metadata is stored       
        --solution-dir <PATH>                          Solution directory used  
                                                       for suppressed-symbol    
                                                       analysis                 
        --source-code-folders <LIST>                   Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       list of source code      
                                                       folder roots for         
                                                       suppressed-symbol        
                                                       analysis                 
        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script        
                                                       executed before          
                                                       aggregation. Repeat for  
                                                       multiple scripts

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Aggregates metrics from OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF inputs and produces 
metrics-report.json/metrics-report.html.

USAGE:

EXAMPLES:

coverage.xml --roslyn metrics.xml --sarif analyzers.sarif --output-json 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json

build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json --output-html 
build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.html

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                         Prints help information  
    -v, --version                                      Prints version           
                                                       information              
        --config <PATH>                                Optional path to         
                                                       .metricsreporter.json. If
                                                       omitted, the file is

                                                       from the working

        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>    Controls informational   
                                                       logging. Errors are      
                                                       always logged            
        --timeout <SECONDS>                            Timeout in seconds for   
                                                       external scripts.        
                                                       Defaults to configuration
                                                       or 900 seconds           
        --working-dir <PATH>                           Working directory used   
                                                       for resolving relative   
                                                       paths                    
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                     Controls execution of    
                                                       configured scripts.      
                                                       Defaults to true         
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>         Controls aggregation     
                                                       after scripts. Defaults  
                                                       to true for

                                                       ignored for generate     
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                   Maximum number of

                                                       logged on script

                                                       4000                     
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                        JSON object mapping      
                                                       metric identifiers to    
                                                       alias arrays. CLI        
                                                       overrides env/config     
        --solution-name <NAME>                         Solution name displayed  
                                                       in reports               
        --metrics-dir <PATH>                           Root directory for

                                                       (OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF/b
                                                       aseline)                 
        --opencover <PATH>                             Path to OpenCover        
                                                       coverage XML. Repeat for 
                                                       multiple files           
        --roslyn <PATH>                                Path to Roslyn metrics   
                                                       XML. Repeat for multiple 
                                                       files                    
        --sarif <PATH>                                 Path to SARIF file.      
                                                       Repeat for multiple files
        --baseline <PATH>                              Path to baseline metrics 
                                                       JSON                     
        --baseline-ref <TEXT>                          Baseline reference label 
                                                       (git commit, build ID,   
                                                       etc.)                    
        --output-json <PATH>                           Path to the resulting    
                                                       metrics-report.json      
        --output-html <PATH>                           Path to the resulting    
                                                       metrics-report.html      
        --thresholds <JSON>                            Inline JSON string with  
                                                       metric thresholds        
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                       Path to JSON file with   
                                                       symbol-level thresholds  
        --input-json <PATH>                            Existing                 
                                                       metrics-report.json used 
                                                       to generate HTML only    
        --excluded-members <LIST>                      Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       member name patterns to  
                                                       exclude                  
        --exclude-methods                              Exclude methods from     
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-properties                           Exclude properties from  
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-fields                               Exclude fields from      
                                                       metrics output           
        --exclude-events                               Exclude events from      
                                                       metrics output           
        --excluded-assemblies <LIST>                   Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       assembly name patterns to
                                                       exclude                  
        --excluded-types <LIST>                        Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       type name patterns to    
                                                       exclude                  
        --replace-baseline                             Replace baseline when new
                                                       report differs           
        --baseline-storage-path <PATH>                 Directory where old      
                                                       baseline files are       
                                                       archived                 
        --coverage-html-dir <PATH>                     Directory containing HTML
                                                       coverage reports for     
                                                       hyperlinking             
        --analyze-suppressed-symbols                   Enable suppressed-symbol 
                                                       analysis before          
                                                       aggregation              
        --suppressed-symbols <PATH>                    Path to JSON file where  
                                                       suppressed symbol        
                                                       metadata is stored       
        --solution-dir <PATH>                          Solution directory used  
                                                       for suppressed-symbol    
                                                       analysis                 
        --source-code-folders <LIST>                   Comma/semicolon-separated
                                                       list of source code      
                                                       folder roots for         
                                                       suppressed-symbol        
                                                       analysis                 
        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script        
                                                       executed before          
                                                       aggregation. Repeat for  
                                                       multiple scripts

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Reads metric violations for a namespace. Returns the most severe violation by 
default; use --all for full listing.

USAGE:
    metricsreporter read [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter read --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json 
--namespace Sample.Loader --metric Complexity

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                         Prints help information  
    -v, --version                                      Prints version           
                                                       information              
        --config <PATH>                                Optional path to         
                                                       .metricsreporter.json. If
                                                       omitted, the file is     
                                                       discovered by walking up 
                                                       from the working         
                                                       directory                
        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>    Controls informational   
                                                       logging. Errors are      
                                                       always logged            
        --timeout <SECONDS>                            Timeout in seconds for   
                                                       external scripts.        
                                                       Defaults to configuration
                                                       or 900 seconds           
        --working-dir <PATH>                           Working directory used   
                                                       for resolving relative   
                                                       paths                    
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                     Controls execution of    
                                                       configured scripts.      
                                                       Defaults to true         
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>         Controls aggregation     
                                                       after scripts. Defaults  
                                                       to true for              
                                                       read/test/readsarif;     
                                                       ignored for generate     
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                   Maximum number of        
                                                       stdout/stderr characters 
                                                       logged on script         
                                                       failures. Defaults to    
                                                       4000                     
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                        JSON object mapping      
                                                       metric identifiers to    
                                                       alias arrays. CLI        
                                                       overrides env/config     
        --report <PATH>                                Path to                  
                                                       MetricsReport.g.json (can
                                                       be provided via config)  
        --namespace <NAME>                             Namespace prefix to      
                                                       filter symbols (e.g.     
                                                       Sample.Loader.Infrastruct
                                                       ure)                     
        --metric <NAME>                                Metric identifier or     
                                                       alias (Complexity,       
                                                       Coupling,                
                                                       Maintainability, etc.)   
        --symbol-kind <ANY|TYPE|MEMBER>                Symbol level to inspect. 
                                                       Defaults to Any          
        --all                                          Emit all matching entries
                                                       instead of only the most 
                                                       severe one               
        --ruleid <ID>                                  Optional SARIF rule      
                                                       identifier filter (e.g.  
                                                       CA1506, IDE0051)         
        --group-by <METRIC|METHOD|TYPE|NAMESPACE>      Controls grouping of     
                                                       violations (metric,      
                                                       namespace, type, method) 
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                       Optional thresholds file 
                                                       (MetricsReporterThreshold
                                                       s.json) used to override 
                                                       report metadata          
        --include-suppressed                           Include metrics that have
                                                       been suppressed via      
                                                       SuppressMessage          
                                                       attributes               
        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script        
                                                       executed before reading. 
                                                       Repeat for multiple      
                                                       scripts                  
        --metric-script <METRIC=PATH>                  PowerShell script        
                                                       executed when the        
                                                       specified metric is      
                                                       requested. Repeatable

DESCRIPTION:
Reads metric violations for a namespace. Returns the most severe violation by 
default; use --all for full listing.

USAGE:

                                                       s.json) used to override

        --include-suppressed                           Include metrics that have

        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script

        --metric-script <METRIC=PATH>                  PowerShell script        
                                                       executed when the

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Aggregates SARIF-based metrics (SarifCaRuleViolations, SarifIdeRuleViolations) 
by rule ID for the specified namespace.

USAGE:
    metricsreporter readsarif [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter readsarif --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
--namespace Sample.Loader
    metricsreporter readsarif --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json
--namespace Sample.Loader --metric SarifIdeRuleViolations --all

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                              Prints help         
                                                            information         
    -v, --version                                           Prints version      
                                                            information         
        --config <PATH>                                     Optional path to    
                                                            .metricsreporter.jso
                                                            n. If omitted, the  
                                                            file is discovered  
                                                            by walking up from  
                                                            the working         
                                                            directory           
        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>         Controls            
                                                            informational       
                                                            logging. Errors are 
                                                            always logged       
        --timeout <SECONDS>                                 Timeout in seconds  
                                                            for external        
                                                            scripts. Defaults to
                                                            configuration or 900
                                                            seconds             
        --working-dir <PATH>                                Working directory   
                                                            used for resolving  
                                                            relative paths      
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                          Controls execution  
                                                            of configured       
                                                            scripts. Defaults to
                                                            true                
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>              Controls aggregation
                                                            after scripts.      
                                                            Defaults to true for
                                                            read/test/readsarif;
                                                            ignored for generate
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                        Maximum number of   
                                                            stdout/stderr       
                                                            characters logged on
                                                            script failures.    
                                                            Defaults to 4000    
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                             JSON object mapping 
                                                            metric identifiers  
                                                            to alias arrays. CLI
                                                            overrides env/config
        --report <PATH>                                     Path to             
                                                            MetricsReport.g.json
                                                            (can be provided via
                                                            config)             
        --metric <NAME>                                     SARIF metric        
                                                            identifier          
                                                            (SarifCaRuleViolatio
                                                            ns,                 
                                                            SarifIdeRuleViolatio
                                                            ns) or 'Any'.       
                                                            Defaults to Any     
        --namespace <NAME>                                  Namespace prefix to 
                                                            filter symbols (e.g.
                                                            Sample.Loader.Infras
                                                            tructure)           
        --symbol-kind <ANY|TYPE|MEMBER>                     Symbol level to     
                                                            inspect. Defaults to
                                                            Any                 
        --ruleid <ID>                                       Optional SARIF rule 
                                                            identifier filter   
                                                            (e.g. CA1506,       
                                                            IDE0051)            
        --group-by <METRIC|METHOD|TYPE|NAMESPACE|RULEID>    Controls grouping of
                                                            SARIF violations    
                                                            (metric, namespace, 
                                                            type, method,       
                                                            ruleId). Defaults to
                                                            ruleId              
        --all                                               Emit all matching   
                                                            groups instead of   
                                                            only the most severe
                                                            one                 
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                            Optional thresholds 
                                                            file                
                                                            (MetricsReporterThre
                                                            sholds.json) used to
                                                            override report     
                                                            metadata            
        --include-suppressed                                Include metrics that
                                                            have been suppressed
                                                            via SuppressMessage 
                                                            attributes          
        --script <PATH>                                     PowerShell script   
                                                            executed before     
                                                            reading. Repeat for 
                                                            multiple scripts    
        --metric-script <METRIC=PATH>                       PowerShell script   
                                                            executed when the   
                                                            specified metric is 
                                                            requested.          
                                                            Repeatable

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Checks whether a symbol satisfies the specified metric after refactoring.

USAGE:
    metricsreporter test [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter test --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json 
--symbol Sample.Loader.SomeType.SomeMethod(...) --metric Complexity

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                         Prints help information  
    -v, --version                                      Prints version           
                                                       information              
        --config <PATH>                                Optional path to         
                                                       .metricsreporter.json. If
                                                       omitted, the file is     
                                                       discovered by walking up 
                                                       from the working         
                                                       directory                
        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>    Controls informational   
                                                       logging. Errors are      
                                                       always logged            
        --timeout <SECONDS>                            Timeout in seconds for   
                                                       external scripts.        
                                                       Defaults to configuration
                                                       or 900 seconds           
        --working-dir <PATH>                           Working directory used   
                                                       for resolving relative   
                                                       paths                    
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                     Controls execution of    
                                                       configured scripts.      
                                                       Defaults to true         
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>         Controls aggregation     
                                                       after scripts. Defaults  
                                                       to true for              
                                                       read/test/readsarif;     
                                                       ignored for generate     
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                   Maximum number of        
                                                       stdout/stderr characters 
                                                       logged on script         
                                                       failures. Defaults to    
                                                       4000                     
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                        JSON object mapping      
                                                       metric identifiers to    
                                                       alias arrays. CLI        
                                                       overrides env/config     
        --report <PATH>                                Path to                  
                                                       MetricsReport.g.json (can
                                                       be provided via config)  
        --symbol <FQN>                                 Fully qualified symbol   
                                                       name (type or member)    
        --metric <NAME>                                Metric identifier or     
                                                       alias to verify (e.g.    
                                                       Complexity, Coupling)    
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                       Optional thresholds file 
                                                       (MetricsReporterThreshold
                                                       s.json) used to override 
                                                       report metadata          
        --include-suppressed                           Include metrics that have
                                                       been suppressed via      
                                                       SuppressMessage          
                                                       attributes               
        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script        
                                                       executed before reading. 
                                                       Repeat for multiple      
                                                       scripts                  
        --metric-script <METRIC=PATH>                  PowerShell script        
                                                       executed when the        
                                                       specified metric is      
                                                       requested. Repeatable

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Checks whether a symbol satisfies the specified metric after refactoring.

USAGE:
    metricsreporter test [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    metricsreporter test --report build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json 
--symbol Sample.Loader.SomeType.SomeMethod(...) --metric Complexity

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                         Prints help information  
    -v, --version                                      Prints version           
                                                       information              
        --config <PATH>                                Optional path to         
                                                       .metricsreporter.json. If
                                                       omitted, the file is     
                                                       discovered by walking up 
                                                       from the working         
                                                       directory                
        --verbosity <QUIET|MINIMAL|NORMAL|DETAILED>    Controls informational   
                                                       logging. Errors are      
                                                       always logged            
        --timeout <SECONDS>                            Timeout in seconds for   
                                                       external scripts.        
                                                       Defaults to configuration
                                                       or 900 seconds           
        --working-dir <PATH>                           Working directory used   
                                                       for resolving relative   
                                                       paths                    
        --run-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>                     Controls execution of    
                                                       configured scripts.      
                                                       Defaults to true         
        --aggregate-after-scripts <TRUE|FALSE>         Controls aggregation     
                                                       after scripts. Defaults  
                                                       to true for              
                                                       read/test/readsarif;     
                                                       ignored for generate     
        --log-truncation-limit <INT>                   Maximum number of        
                                                       stdout/stderr characters 
                                                       logged on script         
                                                       failures. Defaults to    
                                                       4000                     
        --metric-aliases <JSON>                        JSON object mapping      
                                                       metric identifiers to    
                                                       alias arrays. CLI        
                                                       overrides env/config     
        --report <PATH>                                Path to                  
                                                       MetricsReport.g.json (can
                                                       be provided via config)  
        --symbol <FQN>                                 Fully qualified symbol   
                                                       name (type or member)    
        --metric <NAME>                                Metric identifier or     
                                                       alias to verify (e.g.    
                                                       Complexity, Coupling)    
        --thresholds-file <PATH>                       Optional thresholds file 
                                                       (MetricsReporterThreshold
                                                       s.json) used to override 
                                                       report metadata          
        --include-suppressed                           Include metrics that have
                                                       been suppressed via      
                                                       SuppressMessage          
                                                       attributes               
        --script <PATH>                                PowerShell script        
                                                       executed before reading. 
                                                       Repeat for multiple      
                                                       scripts                  
        --metric-script <METRIC=PATH>                  PowerShell script        
                                                       executed when the        
                                                       specified metric is      
                                                       requested. Repeatable
